# TerraUI

Vue 3 + Tailwind v4 component library. Import components from `@terranovasystems/terraui/components` and styles from `@terranovasystems/terraui/styles`.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @terranovasystems/terraui
```

Peer deps: `vue ^3.5`, `pinia ^3`, `vue-router ^5`, `zod ^4`, `@tanstack/vue-table ^8`.

```ts
import '@terranovasystems/terraui/styles'
import { TButton } from '@terranovasystems/terraui/components'
```

## Components

### Dashboard Shell

- [TDashboardGroup](dist/llms/components/TDashboardGroup.md)
- [TDashboardNavbar](dist/llms/components/TDashboardNavbar.md)
- [TDashboardPanel](dist/llms/components/TDashboardPanel.md)
- [TDashboardSidebar](dist/llms/components/TDashboardSidebar.md)
- [TDashboardSidebarCollapse](dist/llms/components/TDashboardSidebarCollapse.md)

### Data Display

- [TAccordion](dist/llms/components/TAccordion.md)
- [TEmptyState](dist/llms/components/TEmptyState.md)
- [TLoadingState](dist/llms/components/TLoadingState.md)
- [TStatTile](dist/llms/components/TStatTile.md)
- [TTable](dist/llms/components/TTable.md)

### Forms

- [TCheckbox](dist/llms/components/TCheckbox.md)
- [TFileInput](dist/llms/components/TFileInput.md)
- [TForm](dist/llms/components/TForm.md)
- [TFormField](dist/llms/components/TFormField.md)
- [TInput](dist/llms/components/TInput.md)
- [TNumberInput](dist/llms/components/TNumberInput.md)
- [TPinInput](dist/llms/components/TPinInput.md)
- [TRadioGroup](dist/llms/components/TRadioGroup.md)
- [TSelect](dist/llms/components/TSelect.md)
- [TTextarea](dist/llms/components/TTextarea.md)
- [TToggle](dist/llms/components/TToggle.md)
- [TUrlInput](dist/llms/components/TUrlInput.md)

### Layout & Navigation

- [TControlBar](dist/llms/components/TControlBar.md)
- [TFilterLabel](dist/llms/components/TFilterLabel.md)
- [TNavbar](dist/llms/components/TNavbar.md)
- [TNavigationMenu](dist/llms/components/TNavigationMenu.md)
- [TNavLink](dist/llms/components/TNavLink.md)
- [TTabs](dist/llms/components/TTabs.md)

### Overlays

- [TDropdown](dist/llms/components/TDropdown.md)
- [TFloatingWindow](dist/llms/components/TFloatingWindow.md)
- [TModal](dist/llms/components/TModal.md)
- [TToast](dist/llms/components/TToast.md)
- [TToastContainer](dist/llms/components/TToastContainer.md)
- [TWindowsContainer](dist/llms/components/TWindowsContainer.md)

### Primitives

- [TAlert](dist/llms/components/TAlert.md)
- [TAvatar](dist/llms/components/TAvatar.md)
- [TBadge](dist/llms/components/TBadge.md)
- [TButton](dist/llms/components/TButton.md)
- [TCard](dist/llms/components/TCard.md)
- [THeading](dist/llms/components/THeading.md)
- [TIcon](dist/llms/components/TIcon.md)
- [TLogo](dist/llms/components/TLogo.md)
- [TSeparator](dist/llms/components/TSeparator.md)
- [TSkeleton](dist/llms/components/TSkeleton.md)
- [TStatusIndicator](dist/llms/components/TStatusIndicator.md)

### Windows

- [NumericKeypadWindow](dist/llms/components/NumericKeypadWindow.md)
